## Plan Summary

Here's what I found and what needs to be done:

### The Bug — `src/utils.ts`, line 7

```typescript
// BUGGY
for (let i = 0; i < items.length - 1; i++) {

// FIX
for (let i = 0; i < items.length; i++) {
```

The `- 1` in the loop condition causes the loop to stop one iteration short, skipping the last element entirely.

---

### Implementation Plan

| Step | Action |
|------|--------|
| 1 | Remove `- 1` from the loop condition on line 7 of `src/utils.ts` — that's the **only** change needed |
| 2 | Run `npx vitest run` to verify all 8 tests pass |

### Why no new tests are needed
`tests/utils.test.ts` already has comprehensive coverage:
- ✅ 3-element array (currently **failing** — will pass after fix)
- ✅ Single-element array (currently **failing** — will pass after fix)
- ✅ Two-element array (currently **failing** — will pass after fix)
- ✅ Empty array (already passing — unaffected by the fix)
